abilities.name: Counterattack
abilities.text: After resolving a (melee) action targeting this model, this model may drain a (t) to deal 3 damage to the attacking model.

abilities.name: Powerful Guardian
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may either attach a Petrified Sentinel upgrade to itself or remove a Petrified Sentinel upgrade from itself.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Eviscerating Bite
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If there are no different enemy models within 4" of the target, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Pouncing Strike
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with a different enemy model within 5". Then, declare this action again, targeting that enemy model.

triggers.name: Draw Their Attention
triggers.text: A friendly model in this model's LoS may discard a card to declare the Interact action.

actions.name: Intimidating Roar
actions.effects: Move the target 6" away from this model.

triggers.name: Ancient Protector
triggers.text: After resolving, this model heals 3 and may attach a Petrified Sentinel upgrade to itself.

triggers.name: Five-Tailed Fan
triggers.text: Target is dealt 1 damage and is moved up to 3".

actions.name: Onward
actions.effects: This model may declare the Walk action.
